# `dnsight audit`

Run a full audit for domain(s) or all manifest targets from config.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `domains` | text | — | no | One or more domains; omit to use config manifest targets. |
| `--recursive` / `-r` | bool | `false` | no | Recursively audit child zones. |
| `--depth` / `-d` | integer range | `3` | no | Maximum depth of recursive audit. |
| `--checks` / `-c` | text | — | no | Comma-separated list of checks to run. |
| `--exclude` / `-e` | text | — | no | Comma-separated list of checks to exclude. |
